title: Nets of polyhedra
description: Practice matching 2D nets to the 3D shapes the fold up into.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Identify the shape that can be formed using the following net.**

$\qquad\qquad$$\qquad\qquad$

[[☃ image 1]]

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: This net is made up of $4$ triangles.  Let’s see what the nets of the figures in the answer choices look like.

The nets of these figures do not have any triangles, so these are not correct.  
$\qquad\qquad$![A cube with all 6 sides equal.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b5cff25e41a0562b880454b9a8639be5.gif)    $\qquad$   ![A rectangular prism with 4 sides equal and 2 ends equal. It has a total of 6 sides.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/049eafb2c6b03b65cb0f65162ed9b182.gif)  
The net of this figure contains $8$ triangles, so it is not correct, either.  

$\qquad\qquad$$\qquad\qquad$

[[☃ image 1]]

This figure is a  tetrahedron.  Its net  is made up of  $4$ triangles.  
$\qquad\qquad$$\qquad\qquad$ 

[[☃ image 1]]

If we fold the net, it will form a tetrahedron.

The correct answer is:  
$\qquad\qquad$$\qquad\qquad$ ![A triangular pyramid. There are 4 total faces.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/2bc5c290a90de39ebdc5edbbaa272709.gif)

options.alt: A net that has 4 triangles. 3 triangles are attached to the 3 sides of 1 triangle.

choices.content: ![A cube with equal side lengths and surface area.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b5cff25e41a0562b880454b9a8639be5.gif)
![A figure made up of 2 rectangular pyramids. There are 8 total faces.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f6a7c0945a734b37f0451bdaae77ae51.png)
![A triangular pyramid. There are 4 total faces.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/2bc5c290a90de39ebdc5edbbaa272709.gif)
![A rectangular prism.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/049eafb2c6b03b65cb0f65162ed9b182.gif)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Identify the shape that can be formed using the following net.**

$\qquad\qquad\qquad$

[[☃ image 1]]

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
This net is made up of $6$ squares. Let’s see what the nets of the figures in the answer choices look like.


The basketball is a sphere, so it does not have a net made up of polygons, and the pyramid has a net consisting of $1$ square and $4$ triangles.  These are not correct answers.  
$\qquad\qquad\qquad$![An image of a basketball.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b16cd62344c732b3003d2d4a6977e0d5.gif)$\qquad$

[[☃ image 1]]

The nets of these figures consist of rectangles, so they could be the correct shapes.  
$\qquad\qquad\qquad$

[[☃ image 1]]

   $\qquad$


[[☃ image 2]]

The net of the Rubik's cube consists of $6$ squares, so this is the correct answer.
The correct answer is:  
$\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad$

[[☃ image 1]]

options.alt: A net that has 6 squares. 4 squares are in a row. 1 square is attached to the top of the second square. 1 square is attached to the bottom of the second square.

choices.content: ![An image of a rectangular pyramid.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a1f3ebd0e24b3cc2f1786a9dd4be8e96.jpeg)
![A rectangular prism.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/aee116a656ffa3bd771052efb074d7cf.png)
![An image of a basketball.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b16cd62344c732b3003d2d4a6977e0d5.gif)
![An image of a rubik's cube. Each face contains 3 rows of 3 squares.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d569bb218919329af2699f5d474aa9a5.gif)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Identify the shape that can be formed using the following net.**

$\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad$

[[☃ image 1]]

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: This net is made up of $3$ rectangles and $2$ triangles.  Let’s see what the nets of the figures in the answer choices look like.

The nets of these figures contain only triangles, so they are not the correct shapes.  
$\qquad\qquad\qquad$![A triangular pyramid. There are 4 total faces.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/2bc5c290a90de39ebdc5edbbaa272709.gif)$\qquad$ 

[[☃ image 1]]

The net of this figure contains only rectangles, so it is not correct, either.  
$\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad$

[[☃ image 2]]

This figure is a right triangular prism.  Its net consists of $3$ rectangles and  $2$ triangles.  
$\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad$

[[☃ image 1]]

If we fold the net, we will get a triangular prism.

The correct answer is:  
$\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad$![A triangular prism. There are 6 vertices and 9 edges. There are 5 faces. 3 of the faces are rectangular and 2 of the faces are triangular.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e15fa538c0d366181bf778b0747ecb00.jpeg)

options.alt: A net that has 3 rectangles and 2 triangles. Rectangles are in a row, with each rectangle attached to the next at the shorter side.  1 triangle is attached to the top of the first rectangle.  1 triangle is attached to the bottom of the first rectangle.

choices.content: ![A rectangular prism.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/049eafb2c6b03b65cb0f65162ed9b182.gif)
![A figure made up of 2 rectangular pyramids. There are 8 total faces.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f6a7c0945a734b37f0451bdaae77ae51.png)
![A triangular pyramid. There are 4 total faces.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/2bc5c290a90de39ebdc5edbbaa272709.gif)

![A triangular prism. There are 6 vertices and 9 edges. There are 5 faces. 3 of the faces are rectangular and 2 of the faces are triangular.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e15fa538c0d366181bf778b0747ecb00.jpeg)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Identify the shape that can be formed using the following net.**

$\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad$

[[☃ image 1]]

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
This net is made up of $8$ triangles.  Let’s see what the nets of the figures in the answer choices look like.

This figure is a cube.  Its net is made up of $6$ squares, so its net does not have any triangles.  This is not the correct shape.  
$\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad$

[[☃ image 1]]

This is a tetrahedron.  Its net is made up of $4$ triangles, so this is not the correct shape.  
$\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad$

[[☃ image 2]]

This figure is a square pyramid.  Its net is made up of $4$ triangles and $1$ square, so this is not the correct shape, either.  
$\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad$

[[☃ image 3]]

This figure is an octahedron.  Its net  is made up of  $8$ triangles, so this is the correct shape.  
$\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad$

[[☃ image 1]]

If we fold the net, it will form an octahedron.
The correct answer is:  
$\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad$

[[☃ image 1]]

options.alt: A net that has 8 triangles. There are two rows of 3 triangles. There is 1 triangle on top of the rightmost triangle in the top row. There is 1 triangle on the bottom of the leftmost triangle in the bottom row.

assessment_items.question_content:

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
These are pyramids of Giza.  Each figure shown is made up of  $4$ triangles and $1$ square.   Let’s see which of the nets is made up of these shapes.

These nets do not contain any squares, so they are not correct.

 $\qquad\qquad\qquad$

[[☃ image 1]]

$\qquad$


[[☃ image 2]]

This net contains $6$ rectangles, so it is not correct, either.

$\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad$
[[☃ image 3]]

This net contains $4$ triangles and $1$ square.

$\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad$
[[☃ image 1]]

  This is the correct net.
The correct net is: 

$\qquad\qquad\qquad$
[[☃ image 1]]

options.alt: An image of two square pyramids.

choices.content: ![A net that has 1 square and 4 triangles. Each triangle is attached to the 4 sides of the square. ](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c70d8e5844a902acee7e1e2657fc2592.png)

![A net that has 6 rectangles.  4 of the rectangles are connected by the long side. There is a rectangle connected to the top and there is a rectangle connected to the bottom of the second rectangle.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d1f2dda1e0dddbe5de483103ffb89575.png)

![A net that has 8 triangles. There are two rows of 3 triangles. There is 1 triangle on top of the rightmost triangle in the top row. There is 1 triangle on the bottom of the leftmost triangle in the bottom row.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3fb7e5a59ab1efdc203b930abba6fc84.png)

![A net that has 3 rectangles and 2 triangles. Rectangles are in a row, with each rectangle attached to the next at the shorter side.  1 triangle is attached to the top of the middle rectangle.  1 triangle is attached to the bottom of the middle rectangle.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/23b50fb84b32d98b21e4b4d61102476c.png)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Identify the net that corresponds to the figure below.**

$\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad$

[[☃ image 1]]

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The figure shown is made up of  $2$ triangles and $3$ rectangles.  It is a triangular prism.  Let’s see which of the nets is made up of these shapes.

This net  contains $6$ rectangles, so it is not the correct net.  

$\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad$

[[☃ image 1]]



These nets contain only triangles, so they are not correct, either.

$\qquad\qquad\qquad$

[[☃ image 2]]

 $\qquad$ 

[[☃ image 3]]

This net is made up of $2$ triangles and $3$ rectangles.  

$\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad$
[[☃ image 4]]




  This is the correct net.
The correct net is: 

$\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad$

[[☃ image 1]]

options.alt: A triangular prism. There are 6 vertices and 9 edges. There are 5 faces. 3 of the faces are rectangular and 2 of the faces are triangular.

choices.content: ![A net that has 6 rectangles.  4 of the rectangles are connected by the long side. There is a rectangle connected to the top and there is a rectangle connected to the bottom of the second rectangle.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d1f2dda1e0dddbe5de483103ffb89575.png)
![A net that has 4 triangles. 3 triangles are attached to the 3 sides of 1 triangle.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f59be883a1d21b0646619c5c2c1d32ab.png)

![A net that has 8 triangles. There are two rows of 3 triangles. There is 1 triangle on top of the rightmost triangle in the top row. There is 1 triangle on the bottom of the leftmost triangle in the bottom row.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3fb7e5a59ab1efdc203b930abba6fc84.png)

![A net that has 3 rectangles and 2 triangles. Rectangles and triangles are alternating. 1 triangle is attached to the short side connecting 2 rectangles. 1 triangle is attached to the short side connecting 2 rectangles.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b8b580c9ec8f3ca9268eec0cfde40be6.png)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Identify the net that corresponds to the octahedron below.**

$\qquad\qquad\qquad$


[[☃ image 1]]

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The octahedron is made up of  $8$ triangles.   Let’s see which of the nets is made up of these shapes.

These nets contain rectangles, so they are not the correct nets.


$\qquad\qquad\qquad$

[[☃ image 1]]


[[☃ image 2]]



This net  contains $4$ triangles, so it is not the correct net.

$\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad$

[[☃ image 3]]



This net  contains $8$ triangles.

$\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad$ 

[[☃ image 1]]



 This is the correct net.
The correct net is: 

$\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad$ 

[[☃ image 1]]

options.alt: A figure made up of 2 square pyramids. There are 8 total faces.

These nets contain only triangles, so they are not correct.

[[☃ image 1]]

[[☃ image 1]]
